name: Identical Facility Duplication for Telecom Sites
description: Pinnacle Telecom is adding a newly commissioned cell tower to their annual Tier II submission. Because the new tower (Cell Tower 102) utilizes the exact same backup diesel generator and lead-acid battery banks as their standard sites, you must duplicate an existing tower's record to save time. Using the EPA Tier2 Submit application (already open), import the baseline facility data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\pinnacle_telecom_baseline.t2s. Then, duplicate the existing 'Pinnacle Telecom - Cell Tower 101' facility record. Open the NEWLY DUPLICATED facility record and update its details for the new site: Facility Name to 'Pinnacle Telecom - Cell Tower 102', Street Address to '9500 Signal Ridge Road', City to 'Austin', Zip Code to '78759', Latitude to '30.3952', and Longitude to '-97.7491'. Do NOT modify the original Cell Tower 101. Verify that Cell Tower 102 successfully inherited the chemical inventory from the original record. Finally, save and export the complete submission (containing both facilities) to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\pinnacle_telecom_multi_site.t2s.
